name: Wood-Rotted Root (Major)
description:
Activate Cast a Spell (add 1 action)

This palm-sized chunk of wood it rotting, and riddled with mold and fungi. You can crush this wood to use it as a spell catalyst when you cast a . When you do, the bark that covers your skin is rotting, and emits a small cloud of spores whenever your hurt. For the duration, whenever you take physical damage, your rotting bark skin emits a cloud of spores in a . Creatures in the area must attempt a save to avoid taking |options:area-damage] damage.
